ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_category" TEXT /* Category of the brand (e.g., spirits, wine, beer) */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year when the brand was established */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand originated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand that offers this product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "measure" TEXT /* Measure of the product (e.g., 750 ml) */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the product (e.g., 25 Under Proof) */,
  "legend" TEXT /* Legend or classification of the product (e.g., WB/GEN) */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., whiskey, vodka, rum) */,
  "flavor_profile" TEXT /* Flavor profile of the product (e.g., sweet, spicy, fruity) */,
  "aging_process" TEXT /* Aging process of the product (e.g., oak barrels, stainless steel tanks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that this price belongs to */,
  "mrp" REAL /* Maximum Retail Price (MRP) of the product */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the product */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Discounted price of the product */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the distributor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the distributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was purchased */,
  "quantity_purchased" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor who made the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that this tax rate belongs to */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the product */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rate becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
